---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused LearnLoop improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What learning or workflow problem should this solve?

## Proposed shape

Describe the smallest useful version.

## Non-goals

What should this not become?

## Fit with LearnLoop

Which part of the loop does it improve?

```text
source -> build -> question -> context -> answer -> source update
```
